Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurrences across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities

Name: Percentage of variants in which SW-AE Assign Reviewers appears at least once
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are immediately followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are immediately followed by SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are immediately followed by SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurring before SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers relative to the total number of reviewer-related assignment activities (e.g., compared to RW-AE Assign Reviewers and RSW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-AE Assign Reviewers is repeated more than three times
Metric: the average of the function base > 3 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are not followed by any reviewer response (i.e., no SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response within 14 days)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that include at least one Reviewer Invitation Reminder
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Ratio of SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur in the same case as Assign a Different Editor
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases that experience delays indicated by “SW-Reviewer Selection is due in...” or “...is late” activities
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers executed before any plagiarism check completion (Plagiarism Originality Report Completed)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that appear in the top 5 most frequent variants
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers grouped by case:concept:name to identify high-effort submissions
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'case:concept:name'}"
